user.title: Set up Mic to MediaPlayer
user.description: Select an Assist Satellite entity as microphone source and a media player for TTS output.

data_description.satellite_entity_id: The satellite entity whose voice input should be monitored (e.g. Assist Microphone app, Wyoming Satellite, ESPHome Satellite).
data_description.media_player_entity_id: The TTS response from the assistant will be played on this media player.

error.satellite_not_found: The selected satellite entity was not found. Please check if it is available.
